scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix client test -- --run
scripts.dev:reset: bash -lc 'pkill -f "node src/server.js" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pkill -f "node ./scripts/stable-proxy-server.cjs" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pkill -f "vite build --watch --mode development" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; npm run dev'
